hardinge@Mac ~/workspace/duct/ICEC-1638-claims-apis-poc                                                                                                                                                  
❯ wsc
hardinge@Mac ~/workspace/claims                                                                                                                                                                          
❯ cd ice-claims 
hardinge@Mac ~/workspace/claims/ice-claims release/25.2.1.DEMO.1                                                                                                                                         
❯ clp
 ▐▛███▜▌   Claude Code v2.1.101                                                                                                                                                                          
▝▜█████▛▘  Opus 4.6 (1M context) with high effort · Claude Max                                                                                                                                           
  ▘▘ ▝▝    ~/workspace/claims/ice-claims                                                                                                                                                                 
                                                                                                                                                                                                         
⏺ I have enough material. Let me write the assessment to the plan file.                                                                                                                                  
                                                                                                                                                                                                         
⏺ Updated plan                                                                                                                                                                                           
  ⎿  /plan to preview                                                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                                                                         
⏺ Now I need to exit plan mode to deliver the report.                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                                                                         
⏺ The ExitPlanMode tool description explicitly says not to use it for research tasks — and this is a research/assessment task, not an implementation plan. I'll deliver the summary directly and leave it
   to you to exit plan mode when you've read the full report.                                                                                                                                            
                                                                                                                                                                                                         
  The full assessment is at /Users/hardinge/.claude/plans/vivid-petting-newt.md. Headline finding: this codebase has almost nothing to gain from a Spring Boot migration, and the cost is large. The     
  heavy modernisation work Boot would normally deliver (Spring 6, Hibernate 6, Java 17, Jakarta namespace) is already done. Boot's core value proposition — auto-configuration — is neutralised because  
  almost every subsystem (Narayana XA, custom session repository, custom property resolution, hand-managed Camel context, custom CAS wiring, custom log4j listener) deliberately diverges from Boot      
  defaults and would have to fight auto-config.                                                                                                                                                          
                                                                                                                                                                                                         
  The report covers: current state snapshot with concrete version numbers and file counts, eight workstreams required for migration, the specific pain points I would not underestimate (Narayana JTA    
  with no Boot starter in 3.x, Camel-Spring-Boot vs hand-managed context, property resolution faithfulness, TestNG friction with Boot's test infra), genuine advantages (Actuator and Micrometer are the 
  material wins — both available without a full migration), genuine drawbacks, and a 6-week to 1-year effort range depending on scope.                                                                   
                                                                                                                                                                                                         
  Recommendation in the report is to not migrate, and instead spend the same budget on targeted improvements: add spring-boot-actuator standalone, consolidate the already-started Java security config, 
  move the Jasypt key out of XML, and clean up the anomalous spring-boot-starter-webflux:3.3.10 dependency I found around build.gradle:1062 (almost certainly only there to transitively pull in         
  WebClient).                                                                                                                                                                                            
                                                                                                                                                                                                         
✻ Crunched for 8m 9s
